summary: Builtins update ritual: re-fetch the Claude Code docs; reconcile every sdk/src/builtins.ts cite (07-07..07-10), the hook-event/mcp-transport sets, and skill forbiddenKeys against them

edit.description: A single reconciliation pass over builtins.ts against a re-fetch of the raw code.claude.com/docs pages (skills, memory, hooks, sub-agents, mcp): re-check every cite dated 07-07..07-10 — clause `cite:` fields and doc-comment retrieval dates alike — bumping wording/date where docs moved (command's legacy-form note; memory's `./.claude/CLAUDE.md` now an equal alternative and `CLAUDE.local.md` not deprecated); re-verify `DOCUMENTED_HOOK_EVENTS` (30, cited 07-10) and `DOCUMENTED_MCP_TRANSPORTS` (5) against the current documented sets, extending each if the docs grew; and review the skill `forbiddenKeys` Cursor-key list (`globs`/`alwaysApply`) against the now-documented Claude Code frontmatter — confirm nothing legitimate is forbidden and no new cross-tool key must be added.

Re-derive the embedded lock. Clause `cite`/`guidance` are `ClauseRow` columns, so any clause `cite:` change moves the lock (doc-comment retrieval dates are TS-only and do not). Regenerate via `pnpm --dir sdk build` and byte-compare; the SDK is emit's sole producer of these rows (rules/sdk.md, 'The engine seam').

tests.asserts: The re-derived built-in lock byte-matches the embedded src/builtin_lock.toml after `pnpm --dir sdk build` — the real cross-language seam, green after any clause-cite change.

acceptance: Every builtins.ts cite reflects a 2026-07-15 re-fetch and stamps its date; DOCUMENTED_HOOK_EVENTS/DOCUMENTED_MCP_TRANSPORTS match the current docs; skill forbiddenKeys reviewed against the grown frontmatter; the frozen-lock test is green (specs/builtins.md: cited and dated — the update ritual walks the clauses and re-checks their citations).
notes: Scoped to the ritual remainder the note carries (cite re-check, hook-event re-verify, forbiddenKeys review) — NOT the grown-frontmatter modeling (audit #2/#6), out of this note's per. Reference docs/market-formats.md §'Claude Code deep audit'; re-fetch each raw page before encoding a cite. No new predicate; the two predicate-needing candidates are forked (builtins-coverage-predicates). observed at 3b8d162; scoped at 1d251f6.

summary: The packaging remainder after the linux-x64+win32-x64 first cut: darwin binaries (Apple notarizing), the plugin/bundle + marketplace.json, and the binary↔npm version lockstep at the v0.1 tag

gate.reason: Human release actions: John's Apple notarizing for the darwin standalone binary + darwin optionalDependency package; the v0.1 launch tag that flips the binary's self-reported crate version (0.1.0) into lockstep with npm's 0.0.x. Channel 3 (plugin/bundle + marketplace.json) is a git repo + marketplace.json + free community web form (verified 2026-07-06, code.claude.com/docs) — no signing creds — but rides the same release-workflow build-out. release.yml (channel 2, linux-x64+win32-x64) + the SDK launcher/optionalDependencies + standalone tag assets shipped 07-11; the standalone-asset step is wired but unexercised until a tag fires.

edit.description: Extend the existing release.yml (linux-x64 + win32-x64 first cut) with the darwin matrix targets (aarch64/x86_64-apple-darwin) + an Apple notarization step, and a channel-3 step producing/publishing the `temper bundle` output with its marketplace.json. Distinct from the standalone tag-asset step, already wired (unexercised until a tag).

acceptance: A stranger acquires temper on all three OSes without a Rust toolchain (darwin binary notarized + pinned), or via the plugin/bundle (marketplace.json); the binary self-reports 0.1.0 in lockstep with the v0.1 npm cut (distribution.md: prebuilt binaries install on all three OSes; lockstep engine pin).
notes: Supersedes retired PACKAGING-CHANNELS (John, 07-11): both its file claims were dead — release.yml now exists (its `new` claim fails the refs gate) and the root-package.json launcher was ruled out (the launcher + optionalDependencies live on the SDK, distribution.md 'What ships'). Release infra outside src/; cargo gates can't validate npm/bundle publish. scoped at b676656.
